debugLogging.name: Enable debug logging
debugLogging.hint: Log kineticist aura detection, creation, cleanup, and combat sync activity to the browser console.

turnStartReminders.name: Enable turn start reminders
turnStartReminders.hint: Post chat reminders for Final Gate and Kinetic Pinnacle at the start of a kineticist's turn.

turnStart.title: Kineticist Reminder
turnStart.finalGate: Final Gate: your kinetic aura is inactive. You can Channel Elements as a free action at the start of your turn.
turnStart.kineticPinnacle: Kinetic Pinnacle: your quickened action can only be used to Channel Elements, a 1-action Elemental Blast, or a 1-action stance impulse.

channelElementsActivated.title: Kinetic Aura Activated
channelElementsActivated.message: Your kinetic aura is now active! You can use your remaining actions to cast 1-action Elemental Blasts or 1-action stance impulses.

actions.stanceImpulse: For a 1-action stance impulse, use the stance from your sheet.

channelElements.alreadyActive: Your kinetic aura is already active.
channelElements.effectMissing: Could not find PF2e's Kinetic Aura effect.

elementalBlast.auraRequired: Channel Elements first: Elemental Blast requires your kinetic aura to be active.
